data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of specific policy fields (deadline, fee, max transfer count) associated with the booking transfer contract. However, the evidence provided does not include any details or records of these policy fields being defined or linked to the bookings, indicating a clear gap in the expected functionality. The prior steps do not demonstrate any actions taken to fulfill this requirement, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of policy fields (deadline, fee, max transfer count) being defined or linked to any booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add policy fields to booking transfer contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the policy fields (deadline, fee, max transfer count) are correctly defined and linked to the booking.
